title: switch to vndr
body:
vndr is almost exactly the same as our old good hack/vendor.sh. Except
it's cleaner and it allows to re-vendor just one dependency if needed
(which we do a lot for containers/image).

close #135

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca <runcom@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@mtrmac PTAL - from now on, there would be no need to run hack/vendor.sh to vendor _every_ dependency. Instead `vndr github.com/containers/image` should just vendor c/image instantly (since it's tiny).
Note that I've explicitly left `hack/vendor.sh` around if anyone is so used to that and want to re-vendor everything.

> Also, this supersedes #135, doesn’t it?

it does, yes
